en: Praise the LORD! For it is good to sing praises to our God; for it is pleasant, and a song of praise is fitting.
zh: 你們要讚美耶和華。 歌頌我們的 神，這是多麼美善， 讚美他，這是美好的，是合宜的。

en: The LORD builds up Jerusalem; he gathers the outcasts of Israel.
zh: 耶和華重建耶路撒冷， 召聚被趕散的以色列人。

en: He heals the brokenhearted and binds up their wounds.
zh: 他醫好傷心的人， 裹好他們的傷處。

en: He determines the number of the stars; he gives to all of them their names.
zh: 他數點星辰的數目， 一一給它們起名。

en: Great is our Lord, and abundant in power; his understanding is beyond measure.
zh: 我們的主偉大，大有能力； 他的智慧無法測度。

en: The LORD lifts up the humble; he casts the wicked to the ground.
zh: 耶和華扶持謙卑的人， 卻把惡人丟棄在地。

en: Sing to the LORD with thanksgiving; make melody to our God on the lyre!
zh: 你們要以感謝的心向耶和華歌唱， 用琴向我們的 神歌頌。

en: He covers the heavens with clouds; he prepares rain for the earth; he makes grass grow on the hills.
zh: 他以密雲遮蓋天空， 為大地預備雨水， 使群山長滿青草。

en: He gives to the beasts their food, and to the young ravens that cry.
zh: 他把食物賜給走獸， 也賜給啼叫的小烏鴉。

en: His delight is not in the strength of the horse, nor his pleasure in the legs of a man,
zh: 他喜歡的不是馬的力大， 他喜悅的不是人的腿快。

en: but the LORD takes pleasure in those who fear him, in those who hope in his steadfast love.
zh: 耶和華喜悅敬畏他的人， 喜悅仰望他慈愛的人。

en: Praise the LORD, O Jerusalem! Praise your God, O Zion!
zh: 耶路撒冷啊！你要頌讚耶和華； 錫安哪！你要讚美你的 神。

en: For he strengthens the bars of your gates; he blesses your children within you.
zh: 因為他堅固了你城門的門閂， 賜福在你中間的兒女。

en: He makes peace in your borders; he fills you with the finest of the wheat.
zh: 他使你的邊界平靖； 用上好的麥子使你飽足。

en: He sends out his command to the earth; his word runs swiftly.
zh: 他向地發出命令， 他的話迅速頒行。

en: He gives snow like wool; he scatters hoarfrost like ashes.
zh: 他降下像羊毛一樣的雪， 撒下像爐灰一樣的霜。

en: He hurls down his crystals of ice like crumbs; who can stand before his cold?
zh: 他拋下像碎屑一樣的冰雹； 面對他發出的寒冷，誰能承受得起呢？

en: He sends out his word, and melts them; he makes his wind blow and the waters flow.
zh: 他發出命令，這一切就都融化； 他使風颳起，水就流動。

en: He declares his word to Jacob, his statutes and rules to Israel.
zh: 他把自己的話向雅各頒布， 把自己的律例和典章向以色列頒布。

en: He has not dealt thus with any other nation; they do not know his rules. Praise the LORD!
zh: 他從沒有這樣對待其他各國； 他們都不知道他的典章。 你們要讚美耶和華。
